description: Known exoplanet transit hosts observed in TESS sector 96 (200 s FFIs). Chosen to span Tmag 9-14 so the TGLC-TICA vs QLP HLSP comparison probes bright saturation regime through faint noise floor. Coordinates are ICRS J2000 from SIMBAD. Cam/CCD is resolved at run-time on PDO via tess-point so this file does not go stale when TESS pointing changes.

excluded.reason: tess-point on PDO reports HATS-71 is NOT in S96, contradicting a prior MAST Tesscut result that claimed S96 cam3/ccd2. Likely a CCD-edge / science-border exclusion. Re-evaluate if the TICA delivery for cam3/ccd2 actually contains this target's pixels.
